name: Ulferts International Limited
summary: Ulferts International Limited, an investment holding company, engages in the wholesale and retail of furniture in Hong Kong. It also offers mattresses, pillows, sofas, sofa beds, beds, cabinets, dining tables, chairs, wardrobes, coffee tables, and sideboards, as well as other ancillary items under the Ulfenbo brand name through its Dormire stores; a network of dealers; and department store counters, pop-up stores, and roadshows. In addition, the company provides compact furniture through its at home stores; and services, including planning, design, procuring, and installation of custom-made furniture for corporate customers, as well as consultation and liaison services with furniture manufacturers. As of March 31, 2020, it operated 21 points-of-sale, including 18 retail stores under the Ulferts, Ulferts Signature, at home, and Dormire names; 2 department store counters and 1 pop-up store under the Ulfenbo name; and online shopping platforms. The company was founded in 1975 and is based in Wanchai, Hong Kong. Ulferts International Limited operates as a subsidiary of Ulferts International Group Holdings Limited.
